name: Zucchini Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together eggs, oil, and sugar until well combined.
2. Mix dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, cocoa powder) in a separate bowl until smooth.
3. Combine the wet and dry mixtures until just incorporated.
4. Spread batter evenly into a greased jelly roll pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until set.
